role_scope: One bounded A2 refinement correction pass that revisits the stalled direct-structure target correlation_diversity_functional, determines whether any current source-anchored exact landing could support future A1_STRIPPED, or explicitly preserves the blocker if no such landing exists.
operator_steps: Stay A2-only. Do not perform proposal-side A1 translation or packaging in this pass.
Treat the current A1_STRIPPED failure as an input symptom, not as permission to invent a landing.
If no current source-anchored exact landing exists, preserve the blocker explicitly and stop fail-closed.
If a thinner landing candidate exists, name the exact source-anchored term and supporting doctrine surfaces, but do not materialize A1 owner graphs in this pass.
prompt_to_send: Run one bounded A2 refinement pass for the stalled direct-structure target correlation_diversity_functional. Using the current blocked A1 stripped state plus the Stage-1 entropy-head A2 doctrine, decide whether any current source-anchored exact landing exists that could later support A1_STRIPPED, or preserve the blocker explicitly if not, and stop with one bounded audit output.
stop_rule: Stop after one bounded A2 refinement-for-stripped-landing correction pass.
